mapper.select: select c.name as name, count(i.item_id) as value from category c left join item i on c.category_id = i.category_id group by c.category_id, c.name order by value desc

select t.range_name as name, count(*) as value from ( select case when price between 0 and 50 then '0-50' when price between 50 and 100 then '50-100' when price between 100 and 200 then '100-200' else '200以上' end as range_name from item where status != 0 ) t group by t.range_name order by case t.range_name when '0-50' then 1 when '50-100' then 2 when '100-200' then 3 else 4 end
select date(create_time) as name, count(*) as value from orders where create_time >= date_sub(now(), interval 30 day) group by date(create_time) order by name
